demo.intro: Follow the money — from the admin's fee collection dashboard to a parent paying an installment by UPI on their phone.

widgets.title: Class 10 Foundation — Quarterly Plan
widgets.subtitle: Fee structure · 4 fee heads · attached to 2 batches

widgets.title: Invoice INV-2026-0412
widgets.subtitle: Priya Sharma · Class 10 Foundation · due 20 Jul 2026

cols.to: Mrs. Sunita Sharma (parent of Priya Sharma), 14 MG Road, Indore, MP

steps.title: Every rupee, one dashboard
steps.text: Online course sales, school-style installments and front-office cash all land in one finance view. Money settles directly into your own gateway account — Stripe, Razorpay, PhonePe, Cashfree, eWAY or PayPal — never Vacademy's.

steps.title: Know exactly who hasn't paid
steps.text: The student fee ledger flags everyone Paid, Partial, Pending or Overdue with a collection progress bar. Filter by course, fee plan or status and drill into any student's full installment schedule.

steps.title: A real counter for offline payments
steps.text: The Fee Collection Desk is a guided four-step counter flow: find the student, pick installments, record cash, cheque, UPI or card — and a receipt is generated on the spot with a download link.

steps.title: School fees the way schools work
steps.text: Model fee heads like Tuition, Admission, Transport or Hostel — each with its own installment schedule, late-payment penalty percentage, refundable flag and built-in discounts. Templates cover Monthly, Quarterly, Term-wise and Annual.

steps.title: Maker-checker, then auto-inherit
steps.text: Structures need a separate approver before going live, and every concession or penalty later runs through the same audited approval queue. Attach the plan to batches so each new admission inherits the right fees automatically.

steps.title: Tax-compliant invoices, your brand
steps.text: Every online payment can auto-generate a branded PDF invoice, or raise one manually — even in bulk — with a pixel-accurate preview. GST splits like CGST 9% + SGST 9% render as a proper tax table with your GSTIN and place of supply.

steps.title: A payment link on every invoice
steps.text: Each invoice carries a shareable public payment page — no login needed to pay. Send it by email or WhatsApp, fire one-click reminders for unpaid invoices, and mark offline settlements paid so books stay accurate.

steps.title: Parents see dues, not spreadsheets
steps.text: Learners and parents check pending and overdue installments across all fee heads right in the app — with amounts, due dates and past receipts — and pay online without visiting the office.

steps.title: Checkout that matches your gateway
steps.text: The pay flow adapts to your configured gateway — UPI, cards, netbanking and wallets via Razorpay or PhonePe, international cards via Stripe. Coupon codes like SIBLING10 validate live and adjust the payable amount instantly.

steps.title: Confirmed, receipted, reconciled
steps.text: The app polls the gateway for the true payment status — no manual refresh — then issues the receipt and emails the invoice automatically. Webhooks are signature-verified, so no payment is ever lost or double-counted.
